  demote     Demote one or multiple releases

result.stderr:
snapx 10.0.1-prerelease.14+e1b6582ed0181acc45df35f350148d63e0316ee0
Copyright � Finter As
USAGE:
Remove current release from all runtime identifiers:
  snapx demote --lock-retries 3 demoapp
Remove current release from win-x64:
  snapx demote --lock-retries 3 --rid win-x64 demoapp
Remove all releases from win-x64:
  snapx demote --lock-retries 3 --rid win-x64 demoapp
Remove all releases from all runtime identifiers:
  snapx demote --lock-retries 3 --remove-all demoapp
Remove all releases from all runtime identifiers greater than --from-version:
  snapx demote --from-version 1.0.0 --lock-retries 3 --remove-all demoapp

  -r, --rid              The Runtime identifier (RID), e.g win-x64.

  --from-version         Remove all releases newer than this version.

  --remove-all           Remove all matching releases.

  --lock-retries         (Default: 3) The number of retries if a mutex fails to
                         be acquired. Set -1 if you want to retry forever.

  --lock-token           Override lock token.

  --skip-await-update    Skip waiting for the nuget feed update.

  --ntp-server           Set network time provider server and port. Example:
                         time.cloudflare.com:123

  -k, --api-key          Required. The nuget server api key.

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.

  value pos. 0           Required. The Application id.

snapx 10.0.1-prerelease.14+e1b6582ed0181acc45df35f350148d63e0316ee0
Copyright � Finter As
USAGE:
Publish a new release for win-x64:
  snapx pack --db-version -1 --lock-retries 3 --rid win-x64 --release-notes "My
  first release :)" --version 1.0.0-prerelease demoapp
Publish a new release for win-x64 and remove all previous releases:
  snapx pack --db-version -1 --gc --lock-retries 3 --rid win-x64 --version
  1.0.0-prerelease demoapp
Publish a new release for win-x64 (non-interactive front-end, e.g Github
Actions):
  snapx pack --db-version -1 --lock-retries 3 --rid win-x64 --release-notes "My
  first release :)" --version 1.0.0-prerelease --yes demoapp

  -r, --rid              Required. Runtime identifier (RID), e.g win-x64

  -v, --version          Required. The application version.

  -y, --yes              Yes (y) to all prompts

  --gc                   Removes all delta releases and creates a new full
                         release

  --db-version           (Default: -1) Manually specify next db version. Has to
                         be greater than current version.

  --lock-retries         (Default: 3) The number of retries if a mutex fails to
                         be acquired (default: 3). Specify -1 if you want to
                         retry forever.

  --lock-token           Override default lock token

  --skip-installers      Skip building installers.

  --skip-await-update    Skip waiting for the nuget feed update.

  --release-notes        Overwrite release notes defined in YML manifest.

  --ntp-server           Set network time provider server and port. Example:
                         time.cloudflare.com:123

  -k, --api-key          Required. The nuget server api key.

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.

  value pos. 0           Required. The application id.

snapx 10.0.1-prerelease.14+e1b6582ed0181acc45df35f350148d63e0316ee0
Copyright � Finter As
USAGE:
Restore packages for all applications:
  snapx restore --dc|download-concurrency 4 --rc|restore-concurrency 4
Restore packages for all applications and build installers:
  snapx restore --dc|download-concurrency 4 --build-installers
  --rc|restore-concurrency 4
Restore packages for demoapp application:
  snapx restore --dc|download-concurrency 4 --rc|restore-concurrency 4 demoapp
Restore packages for demoapp win-x64 application:
  snapx restore --dc|download-concurrency 4 --rid win-x64
  --rc|restore-concurrency 4 demoapp
Restore packages for demoapp win-x64 application and build installers:
  snapx restore --dc|download-concurrency 4 --build-installers --rid win-x64
  --rc|restore-concurrency 4 demoapp

  -r, --rid                    The runtime identifier (RID), e.g win-x64. If
                               left unspecified all runtime identifiers will be
                               restored.

  -i, --build-installers       Build installers.

  --package-file               Generates UTF-8 text file with filenames, sha256
                               checksums (like package-lock.json), enabling CI
                               services (e.g., GitHub Actions) to restore NuGet
                               packages from cache.

  --rc|restore-concurrency     (Default: 4) The number of concurrent restores.

  --dc|download-concurrency    (Default: 4) The number of concurrent downloads
                               for missing packages.

  --help                       Display this help screen.

  --version                    Display version information.

  value pos. 0                 The application id to restore. Leave this value
                               empty if you want to restore all applications.
